name: Spicy Vegetable Lo Mein
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces soba noodles (or other flat Asian noodles)
3 1/2 ounces shiitake mushrooms, caps thinly sliced
1 medium red bell pepper, cut into thin strips
6 ounces sugar snap peas or snow pea pods
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles according to package directions.
2. Meanwhile, heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium heat.
3. Add ginger and garlic; cook for 30 seconds.
4. Add mushrooms, bell pepper, and bok choy; cook for 3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Add broth and sugar snap peas; simmer until vegetables are crisp-tender, stirring occasionally, about 3 to 5 minutes.
6. Stir in tamari or soy sauce and vinegar.
7. Drain noodles; add them to the skillet with the vegetables.
8. Stir in sesame oil; cook for 1 minute, tossing well.
9. Sprinkle with peanuts or cashews if desired.
